title: Blueberry and Garden Salad
description: A fresh summer salad combining the sweetness of blueberries with the crunch of garden greens. Perfect for a light and refreshing snack or lunch.

ingredients.name: Fresh garden greens
ingredients.notes: Mixed greens such as arugula, spinach, and lettuce

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the fresh garden greens.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil and balsamic vinegar to make the dressing.
3. Drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss to coat.
4. Top the salad with the crumbled Canadian feta cheese and fresh blueberries.
